name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Can you add a contribution before midnight to send an unmistakable message to the political establishment about the strength of our movement?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2020
body:
They are planning an “anti-Sanders campaign”
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=1084%2E150750%2EvZ3Wgv)

**The political and financial elite are currently plotting to defeat our campaign, and right now we must send an unmistakable message that we are prepared to take them on and win.

Make a contribution to stand with Bernie before our emergency 48-hour fundraising drive comes to a close at midnight tonight.**
[DONATE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/10999?refcode=em190417-2-15&t=2&akid=1084%2E150750%2EvZ3Wgv)
The _New York Times_ had an article yesterday with the headline, “‘Stop Sanders’ Democrats Are Agonizing Over His Momentum.”
“From canapé-filled fund-raisers on the coasts to the cloakrooms of Washington, mainstream Democrats are increasingly worried...” the article begins.
“The Bernie question comes up in every fundraising meeting I do,” said one fundraiser.
“It has gone from being a low hum to a rumble,” said an operative.
“He did us a disservice in the last election,” said another.
“You can see him reading the headlines now,” Mr. [David] Brock mused: “’Rich people don’t like me.’”
Mr. Brock — who smeared Anita Hill and who led an effort to stop our political revolution four years ago — is almost correct. They don’t just hate Bernie Sanders. They hate everything our political revolution embodies. They hate Medicare for All, the Green New Deal, breaking up big banks, free public college for all.
That is why, in the next 48 hours, we are launching a fundraising drive that I hope will send an unmistakable message to the political establishment about the strength of our political revolution.
That’s why I’m asking you today:
[**Make a $3 contribution to our campaign as part of our emergency 48-hour fundraising drive to fight back against the “anti-Sanders” campaign being hatched by the financial elite of this country.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/10999?refcode=em190417-2-15&t=27&akid=1084%2E150750%2EvZ3Wgv)
They may have “canapé-filled fundraisers.” We have each other.
In solidarity,
Faiz Shakir
Campaign Manager

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=28&akid=1084%2E150750%2EvZ3Wgv). You can also [sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=29&akid=1084%2E150750%2EvZ3Wgv). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=30&refcode2=1084_150750_vZ3Wgv&akid=1084%2E150750%2EvZ3Wgv).
Submit this form to [update your contact information](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/update-info/?t=31&akid=1084%2E150750%2EvZ3Wgv).

name: Cory Booker
subject: What we now know about the Mueller report
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| _" Robert S. Mueller III's findings will be public on Thursday, but some of them will not be news to President Trump. Justice Department officials have had numerous conversations with White House lawyers about the conclusions made by Mr. Mueller..."
-The New York Times, April 17, 2019_ Team: Trump appointee Attorney General William Barr is expected to release a redacted version of the Mueller Report tomorrow. This is after he "summarized" the Mueller Report for the public and after we learned that he was providing guidance to the White House on how to respond. [_**Join me in demanding that Mueller 's final report and investigative materials are made public immediately.**_](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc760e/5fca0d19/1a8e70db/291a892a/3997877152/VEsH/ "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/release-the-report-0417?source=em_pet_20190417") Transparency just doesn't exist in this administration -- we need to take action. The Attorney General is supposed to work for all of us, for every American -- not for the White House. Barr is not the President's personal lawyer, he is America's lawyer. We need to demand full transparency from our Justice Department in this matter of extraordinary national importance. **I can 't do this without you, team. If we're going to demand transparency, we need to make our voices heard -- _all the way to the White House._** [](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc760e/5fca0d19/1a8e70db/291a8929/3997877152/VEsE/ "http://act.corybooker.com/page/s/release-the-report-0417?source=em_pet_20190417") Together, Cory
---

This campaign is moving quickly. It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. name: Jason Yates
subject: What % of Americans won’t pay any federal income tax?
body:
| | Peter, Tax-filing season came to a close on Monday as Americans pushed the April 15 deadline to finish filing. Many Americans delayed, in part, due to the significant changes they faced this year under the 2017 Tax Cuts and Jobs Act. While 28 percent of Americans expected to pay more this year than last, the nonpartisan Tax Policy Center estimates that about 80 percent of filers will pay less for their 2018 income taxes.
The Center’s analysis found that taxpayers earning less than $25,000 annually got an average tax cut of $60. Those earning roughly between $49,000 and $86,000 got a tax break of around $900. **Guess what percentage of Americans won’t pay any federal income tax in 2018?** [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=Ou1Uor2aiLeLyreThul0RgpbgnSkyl_WY7Dr--vc2ryLY_Cveo-pDZrOPiY0V-aVamA-ii07cGFVBRlHA5YwOS5Pimk3FzsqvUBerBt-k-3DAVEO0xVx441zbpMSa5HCPShMo9rBPLGhG6gaoGLn8g&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190418qna01&n=1) [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=Ou1Uor2aiLeLyreThul0RgpbgnSkyl_WY7Dr--vc2ryLY_Cveo-pDZrOPiY0V-aVamA-ii07cGFVBRlHA5YwOS5Pimk3FzsqvUBerBt-k-3DAVEO0xVx441zbpMSa5HCyHwI8ONfmDvW3FK1UvXiDQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190418qna01&n=2) [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=Ou1Uor2aiLeLyreThul0RgpbgnSkyl_WY7Dr--vc2ryLY_Cveo-pDZrOPiY0V-aVamA-ii07cGFVBRlHA5YwOS5Pimk3FzsqvUBerBt-k-3DAVEO0xVx441zbpMSa5HC-gbI5Ku1FFK_PjECHH4ZRQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190418qna01&n=3) [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=Ou1Uor2aiLeLyreThul0RgpbgnSkyl_WY7Dr--vc2ryLY_Cveo-pDZrOPiY0V-aVamA-ii07cGFVBRlHA5YwOS5Pimk3FzsqvUBerBt-k-3DAVEO0xVx441zbpMSa5HC6d8JXzaku6lKuMFExXGBIg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190418qna01&n=4) **United. body:
| | Friend --
[](http://my.yang2020.com/?e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=041719_3_dc_rally&n=1)[](http://my.yang2020.com/?e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=041719_3_dc_rally&n=2) Thank you so much for your support! It’s been an amazing few days. Rave reviews continue to come in from our [CNN Town Hall on Sunday](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=9j2xrPCwd3yFLU_EZoBgHlxOww_eP95bxQBYEjn713xxZbogDLNX1kLSkX1_Qi1mFSbuFuE4-K3MDCWIVADRejRYUii7dsL8Dc4QD-KPjz8&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=041719_3_dc_rally&n=3 "CNN Town Hall Updates")—I’ve been described as “the most human,” “knowledgeable,” “likeable,” and “presidential” in various outlets. Our website traffic has spiked, press asks have been streaming in, and we’ve raised over $250k in [donations](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztwOurmyDQdaH3NaKLwEpcOs_qERRaTe8gJm33SFRN8ZQ&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=041719_3_dc_rally&n=4 "Andrew Yang
ActBlue Page") and [swag sales](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=OJW7B7dIawl8qH5Qk_BYPdZOD3rcdyLajlHu8vwhEMw&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=041719_3_dc_rally&n=5 "Andrew Yang Swag Store") since Sunday. Thank you so much for making it happen! In other enormous news, [an Emerson national poll](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=fVc8ucaySv8SFEdMhk87O-J7Kfx-4kCDXGvdbkDZpGEfFteGdqy4Efsytc0CXc8ToMc5nPYE3LqrEj2yvUJX5bBkIZ7Mu0Dx2ot7nYVrbCzlGMkVk_EIpK3Zs_7kPqKW8akusPm1amZvbro98vEYJ29T4TBbwjTc170fGAMgfgvp_Xsc_Q-UTEiroM-TFlXx&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=041719_3_dc_rally&n=6 "Emerson
Poll") came out on Monday that had me at 3% nationally. Think about that for a second—3% of Americans said that I was their top choice for President of the United States. This was taken BEFORE the Town Hall. To go from unknown to 3% national support is phenomenal. The Emerson poll is one of the polls that the DNC uses to determine candidate support. We will only grow from here. We can contend and win the whole thing. After the Town Hall, I did a [televised interview with PBS](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=oWuEpUh4tc8-2CTyEt7AWz6YzxjdIbowkQbXKCPh9L2aFw-m_-65VJ3k6eUlJH7s-6kOzlhWdFtRrRTRv_zlS6eb0tSyBGDonypWk7Xnq2lrA01dDUi5r9Iv3dqxBq_YNrr0qI-9CZRlIuTbgeeUMw&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=041719_3_dc_rally&n=7 "Andrew Yang on PBS NewsHour") as well as interviews with [NPR](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=oGkNRIpNU-65tzHrfmdwr2Kgi5qdn8_VU41vtsY0uF4JW2reJ4x5n7ErNfLH7rhHtKjRMwf6POWwbg5y8KGn6Djr-z0ox81v3-s2DmiEHEem50x5Bs5Y77pa3SVXLA2p9DOwnzJo4E18c2OjCPtWdg&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=041719_3_dc_rally&n=8 "Andrew
Yang on NPR"), Bloomberg, and Politico. And then we had one of our biggest rallies yet on the steps of the Lincoln Memorial on the National Mall. | |
---|---
Almost 2,000 supporters were there and the rally was covered in [C-SPAN](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=B-xMNSNcDpdY3m1jne-HGTmimtP4AQhDB9dpU3LxAH8cWbyknVvOhNKxwsBZSzLkwpYq8WR40-pc3dS21NQktkhRt_GNjBQmibfal7sNQTdGxraBQb5YAGFd2APrqGXwxD-JlRgPsCFECj6VhV98K19I30qgqDRKA4SvRbTfJEQ&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=041719_3_dc_rally&n=9 "C-SPAN Coverage of DC Humanity
First Rally"), [Business Insider](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=GUadKUZbNtXpoQtrN7XiLlDAp0T1nvsEvUIUmB084zH3HJ9cEQzlAEWhfZ66t17Qa62-5kZjgBAanzyov8yHZH-foHg4wON-JRLLJ2M6QgxP5H-fv_qpJkItak3EBTiv&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=041719_3_dc_rally&n=10 "Business Insider: Andrew Yang's DC Rally"), Fox, and other press outlets. It was a blast. This campaign is quickly becoming the movement that we need. If you attend a rally you will see what I mean.
This week, I am doing national press, and today I'm heading to [Atlanta for our next Humanity First Rally](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=uuUyPGiVHWR_V3cUbcvCWdikqgOEmv95as43Y58cghcynEWArafY6CLoShvC42HRZL5g5xhxUZLHmTab6WxHEJEP8dG8qiqDWSchrx2zP6w&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=041719_3_dc_rally&n=11 "Andrew Yang Humanity First Atlanta
Rally"). Over 2,000 people have RSVPed and it should be dynamite. On Monday, we are having [another big rally in Los Angeles](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=uuUyPGiVHWR_V3cUbcvCWdikqgOEmv95as43Y58cghdC0x4uB67GuDtr5hFFsorLDVLqNH4xMrhb2ARH5cFpEWhl8vBsdJaT4ggXqhOlCMw&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=041719_3_dc_rally&n=12 "Andrew
Yang Humanity First Rally in LA"). ([Full Schedule](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=c5dAo5qulKAncvNYjq2uGcnHAN92nM1CHInwgA-PIi7HdTRyEez5JIs0AF2zI3zA&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=041719_3_dc_rally&n=13 "Full Schedule for the
Humanity First Tour"))
We are getting stronger all of the time. I am too. It feels great.
We are still in the midst of a fundraising drive—[please do donate $20 today if you can](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztwOurmyDQdaH3NaKLwEpcO18xGzef5TvO42JaBQed0jdWXtiYd7YoTmFcK-0i3r20&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=041719_3_dc_rally&n=14 "Andrew Yang ActBlue Page"). We are neck-and-neck with Bernie in terms of grassroots support (81% vs. 84% small contributions of <$200) and want to be the most people-powered campaign in the field. Your support will make us better able to fight and grow. Thank you for believing in us.
An [article came out in TIME Magazine](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=3nQtyGU6AIRwl-oCWnvkk4OiE_tgVoaq7plG9yucSZEsM5_2BlPeN8tLbQhpauaCIiqT1Za0nVuPVH10CMv9cGaviHcu9ltWkfqAoF60LhvaGCGl8c3K3cmJb2s6vDXmuYdfZfGvMETXBp6dRwxf8KLP_cIpBkGwF2kcxIrOCHl6YdpQynQIc5sFccJ2hymRerKJ0oJOk30Vvroi8gCX34-4o61udjEK6-TgVz9k8W3zm-OBm__aLXB7ZSIxh-Yx&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=041719_3_dc_rally&n=15 "Everyone's Talking About
Basic Income. Here Are 8 Problems It Could Fix") that argued Universal Basic Income could help solve 8 of our biggest problems: Inequality, Economic Insecurity, Debt, Stress, Precarity, Robots, Extinction, and Populism. I don’t know about that last one, but the rest is dead on. The problems are rising and we need real solutions. The world is coming our way.
3% of Americans want me as President—and most have still never heard of me. The more they hear about me, the stronger we will get.
Let’s get it.
-Andrew

[ DONATE $20](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztwOurmyDQdaH3NaKLwEpcO18xGzef5TvO42JaBQed0jdWXtiYd7YoTmFcK-0i3r20&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=041719_3_dc_rally&n=17)

[ DONATE $50](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztwOurmyDQdaH3NaKLwEpcO18xGzef5TvO42JaBQed0jaBNWLsD3frblJj2FiCYkZw&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=041719_3_dc_rally&n=18)

**Can you make a donation today?**

Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us invest in people.

**Join the Yang Gang!**

If you'd like to volunteer to help with grassroots organizing, please fill out an organizer application [here](https://my.yang2020.com/yang_gang_app?e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=041719_3_dc_rally&n=19) and someone from our team will reach out.

|

Thank you for helping to make Universal Basic Income a reality.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Mueller Probe Was a Waste of Time and Money – No Collusion, No Obstruction
body:
"The report finally puts to bed the main allegation that the left has been consumed with for nearly three years." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4f59b8cbd1&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Mueller Probe Was a Waste of Time and Money – No Collusion, No Obstruction**

“As partisan Democrats and the liberal media hyperventilate over Attorney General William Barr’s release of Special Counsel Robert Mueller’s report Thursday, they’re willfully ignoring the fact that they already know what the report concludes: Two years and $35 million was spent investigating a lie,” David Bossie writes in Fox News.

“The report finally puts to bed the main allegation that the left has been consumed with for nearly three years. Much to their chagrin, the lie that they pushed for the entire Trump presidency has been completely dismissed by Mueller.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bb3d464d2d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| If one number encapsulates the historic economic turnaround under President Trump, it’s this: “7.1 million unfilled jobs,” Heritage Foundation Senior Fellow Stephen Moore writes in the _[Boston Herald](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8608146c33&e=3ee4985eea)_. “The irony of all this is that at the very moment the left wants to institute a ‘guaranteed livable income’ for every American, Trump is doing that and more by making sure that every last American who wants one can get a job.”
---
|
---
| Yesterday, Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump spoke at the Women Entrepreneurs Financial Initiative (WeFi) summit in Ivory Coast—the last stop on her four-day tour of Africa, Esha Sarai reports in _[VOA News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d84162495b&e=3ee4985eea)_. The goal of the trip was promoting the Women’s Global Development and Prosperity Initiative, a $50 million project launched by President Trump in February to encourage women’s economic empowerment in developing countries.
---
|
---
| “Retired FDNY firefighter Jim Riches, whose son Jimmy was murdered on 9/11, blasted Minnesota Democratic Rep. Ilhan Omar Tuesday night for explaining the attack as ‘some people did something.’ He demanded an apology from the Democratic congresswoman while panning New York Democrats for defending her,” Kerry Picket reports in _[The Daily Caller](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d9cf4420c0&e=3ee4985eea)_. “Donald Trump is 100 percent right,” Riches said.
---
|
---
| “Rep. Rashida Tlaib (D., Mich.) urged her supporters to join her in a hunger strike to push for action to ‘shut down’ U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE), arguing the radical push to abolish ICE can't be achieved by Congress,” Brent Scher reports for _[The Washington Free Beacon](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=970c4845b0&e=3ee4985eea)_. “Tlaib, headlining a Detroit fundraiser this past weekend for the Michigan Coalition for Human Rights, complained of colleagues who are constantly ‘policing’ what she says and lack willingness to embrace bold stands such as abolishing ICE.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=eee89799b8&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8dd18e3a41&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=6e242688bf)
---

---

name: Katelyn Coghlan, Beto for America
subject: Why we’ve been sending you so many emails
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

We’ve been sending you a lot of emails asking for donations, and we want
you to know why.

It’s not just that it requires a huge amount of money to run a competitive
campaign. It’s also that we’re actually trying to change how politics
fundamentally works in this country -- by building not just a campaign,
but a movement that will listen and talk to more people than any
presidential effort has ever done before.

We’re dedicating the majority of our resources to make this a real,
people-powered movement -- setting up the tools to reach voters in every
zip code, organizing town halls for Beto to talk to those who’ve been
overlooked for far too long, letting people know about events near them,
and hiring the staff to train and support volunteers in every corner of
this country.

But with all of the organizing we’ve been doing, we’re behind on the
fundraising required to pull all of this off. So we’re asking now, because
it really matters:

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17415?refcode=ema20190418-27906&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1019&akid=27906%2E444211%2EeFFv44 ]Can we count on you to make a $3 investment right now?
We need your help to build the movement that can fundamentally change our
politics in this country.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17415?refcode=ema20190418-27906&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=27906%2E444211%2EeFFv44 ]Contribute $3 »

We’re 100% funded by people -- not a dime from PACs, corporations, or
special interests. We will never be corrupted by the influence of big
money.

Together, we can create a new politics that represents all of us. No one
left out. Already, Beto has visited more towns than any other candidate,
and we’ve launched a 50-state voter contact program. But to keep
sustaining our growing movement, it’ll require thousands of people like
you, giving what you can each time.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17415?refcode=ema20190418-27906&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=27906%2E444211%2EeFFv44 ]Please pitch in what you can today. Every contribution matters and
gets us closer towards the vision for our country we want to build.

Thank you,

Katelyn Coghlan for the Beto Organizing Team

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20190418footer&t=1022&refcode2=27906_444211_eFFv44&akid=27906%2E444211%2EeFFv44

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=27906%2E444211%2EeFFv44

body:
The past two weeks have been unbelievable thanks to supporters like you. | | |
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fccb3/3eb3e2fc/4bbf8e38/7449e957/3973876591/VEsH/ "https://www.julianforthefuture.com?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=201904017_em_thank-you-recap-du&source=201904017_em_thank-you-recap-du")

| | I want to say thank you. The past two weeks have been unbelievable _._ I launched my People First immigration plan, shared my vision with Rachel Maddow, held rallies in East LA and my hometown of San Antonio, spoke with voters at a CNN town hall, and continued my mission to visit all 50 states. [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fccb3/3eb3e2fc/4bbf8e38/7449e956/3973876591/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/juliandebate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=201904017_em_thank-you-recap-du&source=201904017_em_thank-you-recap-du") _In San Antonio, you came together to let Donald Trump know that Texans believe in compassion, not cruelty, when it comes to immigration._ [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fccb3/3eb3e2fc/4bbf8e38/7449e955/3973876591/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/juliandebate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=201904017_em_thank-you-recap-du&source=201904017_em_thank-you-recap-du") _We spoke about putting people first when it comes to immigration, education, housing and healthcare._ [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fccb3/3eb3e2fc/4bbf8e38/7449e954/3973876591/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/juliandebate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=201904017_em_thank-you-recap-du&source=201904017_em_thank-you-recap-du") _Rachel Maddow asked me pressing questions about the issues facing our country._ _I was honored to share my vision for our nation with the Democratic Party of Wisconsin._ [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fccb3/3eb3e2fc/4bbf8e38/7449e953/3973876591/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/juliandebate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=201904017_em_thank-you-recap-du&source=201904017_em_thank-you-recap-du") _I joined Voces de la Frontera for their art day in preparation for their Day of Action._ [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fccb3/3eb3e2fc/4bbf8e38/7449e952/3973876591/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/juliandebate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=6&utm_campaign=201904017_em_thank-you-recap-du&source=201904017_em_thank-you-recap-du") _I enjoyed a beautiful day in East Los Angeles, speaking to residents about how Trump's immigration policies hurt California._ As I meet and speak with more Americans, the momentum is growing. **We've surpassed 50,000 donors and are well on our way to the 65,000 we need to secure a spot on the national debate stage.** The most amazing part of this? 33,000 of those new donors contributed in the past two weeks alone! [**We aren't to 65,000 yet.**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fccb3/3eb3e2fc/4bbf8e38/7449e951/3973876591/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/juliandebate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=7+-+We+arent+to+65000+yet&utm_campaign=201904017_em_thank-you-recap-du&source=201904017_em_thank-you-recap-du")**** So while I send emails asking for your continued support, I just want to say thank you. Thank you for believing in me and my vision for the future of America. Let's keep building toward a future that puts people first,
Julian

We can't trust Trump's handpicked attorney general to be remotely transparent about what's contained in the report.
Peter,
Attorney General William Barr just released a redacted version of the Mueller report.
His preemptive press conference today was a complete farce and an embarrassing display of propaganda on behalf of President Trump.
Barr works for the American people, not the president of the United States. **We deserve the full picture. We deserve to know just how far Trump 's corruption extends.** We deserve justice and accountability. Most of all, we deserve a president who doesn't harm the country just to serve himself.
We can't trust Trump's handpicked attorney general to be remotely transparent about what's contained in the report. Members of Mueller's team have already said that Barr's conclusions about the report don't tell the full story.
Congress needs to see the full report--and the public needs to know the extent of Russia's interference in our 2016 election and whether Trump obstructed justice.

name: Beto Organizing Team
subject: We want you to know why
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

We’ve been sending you a lot of emails asking for donations, and we want
you to know why.

It’s not just that it requires a huge amount of money to run a competitive
campaign. It’s also that we’re actually trying to change how politics
fundamentally works in this country -- by building not just a campaign,
but a movement that will listen and talk to more people than any
presidential effort has ever done before.

We’re dedicating the majority of our resources to make this a real,
people-powered movement -- setting up the tools to reach voters in every
zip code, organizing town halls for Beto to talk to those who’ve been
overlooked for far too long, letting people know about events near them,
and hiring the staff to train and support volunteers in every corner of
this country.

But with all of the organizing we’ve been doing, we’re behind on the
fundraising required to pull all of this off. So we’re asking now, because
it really matters:

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17415?refcode=ema20190418-27968&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1019&akid=27968%2E444211%2EhLW_Ii ]Can we count on you to make a $3 investment right now?
We need your help to build the movement that can fundamentally change our
politics in this country.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17415?refcode=ema20190418-27968&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=27968%2E444211%2EhLW_Ii ]Contribute $3 »

We’re 100% funded by people -- not a dime from PACs, corporations, or
special interests. We will never be corrupted by the influence of big
money.

Together, we can create a new politics that represents all of us. No one
left out. Already, Beto has visited more towns than any other candidate,
and we’ve launched a 50-state voter contact program. But to keep
sustaining our growing movement, it’ll require thousands of people like
you, giving what you can each time.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17415?refcode=ema20190418-27968&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=27968%2E444211%2EhLW_Ii ]Please pitch in what you can today. Every contribution matters and
gets us closer towards the vision for our country we want to build.

name: Kamala Harris
subject: Redacted
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
This morning, a redacted copy of Special Counsel Robert Mueller’s report from the Department of Justice was made public. Attorney General Bill Barr only released this redacted report _after_ providing a copy to the president’s personal lawyers, and _after_ he gave a press conference on national television filled with political spin and propaganda. **Let’s be clear: Barr is acting more like Trump’s defense attorney than the nation’s Attorney General.** Congress has a constitutional duty to conduct oversight of the executive branch. As a United States Senator, I take this responsibility seriously. The American people deserve the unvarnished truth -- without spin from the president’s hand-picked Attorney General. **This redacted report is not enough.** **[Congress needs to see the full, unredacted Mueller report and all of the investigation’s underlying evidence -- and Special Counsel Robert Mueller must testify publicly before Congress. Add your name now if you agree »](https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/kdh-email-petition-190418-mueller?refcode=ema190418-full&source=ema190418-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1&akid=4379%2E5755789%2ECRSxyj)** | | [ SIGN THE PETITION ](https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/kdh-email-petition-190418-mueller?refcode=ema190418-full&source=ema190418-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=2&akid=4379%2E5755789%2ECRSxyj)
---
Thanks for raising your voice at this important moment for our nation. It’s up to all of us to demand the truth. I’ll be in touch as we learn more.
For The People,
— Kamala Harris

We need to tell you 3 critical things about our campaign right now:
| | |
---
Peter, we need to tell you three critical things about our campaign right now:
1\. There are a lot of candidates in this race. More announce every week. And many of them are putting up big enough fundraising numbers to qualify for the Democratic debate stage.

2\. Candidates can qualify for the debates via polling, like Kirsten has. But the DNC has said if the list of candidates who qualify gets too long, it's going to prioritize candidates who also have 65,000 individual donors to their campaign.

3\. We've made tremendous progress, but we still haven't hit 65,000 donors. **To stay on track to guarantee Kirsten's spot on the debate stage, we need to add 1,000 new donors by the end of the week.**
**[Before midnight on Friday, can you donate $7 to become one of the 1,000 new donors we need this week to officially carry Kirsten to the debate stage? Any amount helps:](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976f36/2ae112ef/6d1cefde/357de9ea/2319280530/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMwMzMtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3033-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&amount=7")**

Kirsten is brave enough to go toe-to-toe with anyone to do the right thing, whether it's powerful institutions or Donald Trump.
She has the most anti-Trump voting record in the Senate, and she's one of the only candidates in this primary race taking the fight right to him--that's why she launched her campaign in front of Trump International itself last month.
Kirsten's committed to fighting for what's right, no matter the consequences. It's her bold action that has passed the 9/11 health care bill and the repeal of Don't Ask, Don't Tell. And she knows that in order to pass even more bold, progressive policies--like Medicare for All or the Green New Deal--you have to root out the corruption and special interests that stand in the way.
That's the story Kirsten will tell on the national stage, and that's why it's so essential you help get her there.

Thanks,

Team Gillibrand

| | | **ALERT: President Trump 's hand-picked Attorney General released a REDACTED version of the Mueller report today.**

[_**A redacted report is unacceptable. Sign the petition and tell the DOJ to release the full, unredacted Mueller report!**_](http://ma.edmarkey. If the Department of Justice had released a redacted Warren Commission Report, Iran/Contra Report, or the 9/11 Commission Report, it would have been unacceptable.

To get a redacted Mueller report today is just as unacceptable. This is a pivotal moment for our country, and we must know the full truth.

[_**That 's why I'm calling on the DOJ to release the full, unredacted Mueller report. Join me and add your name to our petition. We must demand the whole truth.**_](http://ma.edmarkey. This entire process has subverted accountability and transparency.

* Before becoming Attorney General, William Bar wrote a memo criticizing the Mueller investigation.

* Trump then picks Barr to be his new AG.

* Barr issues a laughable summary of Muller's report and declares no wrongdoing.

* Barr briefs the White House on the Mueller report before Congress or the public ever see it.

* And now Barr released a redacted report.

The American people deserve to know the entire contents of the Mueller report. We cannot allow Trump's DOJ to blackout the truth.

[_**Sign the petition and call on the DOJ to release the full, unredacted Mueller report.**_](http://ma.edmarkey. "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/mueller-report-redacted/markey/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Thanks for standing with me,

Ed

body:
This morning, after two years and $35 million of taxpayer money wasted, Special Counsel Robert Mueller’s report concluded what President... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=38d5f6ef82&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • April 18, 2019
---
| | |
# **A 2-year, $35 million witch hunt ends**

**This morning,** after two years and $35 million of taxpayer money wasted, Special Counsel Robert Mueller’s report concluded what President Donald J. Trump has told the American people from day one: There has been no collusion or obstruction of justice.

**Attorney General William Barr** addressed reporters this morning from the Department of Justice, explaining that he would transmit copies of a public version of the Special Counsel’s report to Congress at 11 a.m. today. Furthermore, in the ultimate act of transparency, he announced that the Administration would make the report available to the general public through the Justice Department’s own website.
**🎬****Watch:**[Attorney General Barr: No collusion. That’s the bottom line.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=39992c2378&e=3ee4985eea)
**“The Special Counsel** found no evidence that any American—including anyone associated with the Trump campaign—conspired or coordinated with the Russian government” in its efforts to interfere with the 2016 election, the Attorney General said.

**No collusion. No obstruction.** Yet here is the time and effort it cost the United States Government, at the demand of Congressional Democrats, to reach that conclusion:
* 675 days—nearly 2 years—from when Mueller was appointed to when he produced his final report for Attorney General Barr
* 2,800+ subpoenas issued from the Special Counsel’s office
* 500 witnesses interviewed
* Nearly 500 search warrants carried out
* More than 230 communications records demanded
* More than _$35 million_ spent

**Some on the left** will still claim it wasn’t enough. After years of unsubstantiated speculation—including from many in the mainstream media—the far left remains too committed to a false collusion narrative to let it go. But it is time for Americans across the political spectrum to come together and call on Congress to govern rather than obstruct.

**“While many Democrats** will cling to discredited allegations, the American people can be confident President Trump and I will continue to focus where we always have, on advancing an agenda that’s making our nation stronger, safer, and more secure,” Vice President Mike Pence said in a statement.

**Today, the witch hunt is over.** What Congressional Democrats choose to do now will define both Washington and Americans’ faith in government for years to come. Will they continue to try to delegitimize a duly elected President, or will they at last work with him in good faith to deliver a positive agenda for middle- and working-class America?

[Watch: NO COLLUSION – NO OBSTRUCTION, President Trump has said from day one.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c47140df8e&e=3ee4985eea)

**More:** [Statement from Vice President Pence ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ced41b3b1e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **President Trump****hosts****annual Wounded Warrior ride****event at White House**

**At the White House** , President Trump hosted wounded veterans today in honor of the annual Wounded Warrior Project Soldier Ride.

**The Soldier Ride** is a multi-day, rehabilitative bicycle ride for veterans and wounded service members. And for the past decade, a number of these wounded warriors have been invited to the White House to meet the President during the event.

**“Their legacy of service** is a gift to every single American. Through their example, we witness the daily triumph of the human spirit and the unmatched valor of the American patriot,” President Trump said today, surrounded by these national heroes.

**“Each of you** is a living testament to the outstanding determination, persistence, and patriotism that made this the greatest nation ever to exist on the face of the Earth.”

[**Watch President Trump****host********W****ounded****W****arrior****s at the White House**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ce62c5bf88&e=3ee4985eea)
---
